label: Hero
prompt: Create a premium hero product image on a clean studio or minimal lifestyle background. Preserve exact hardware design, dimensions, ports, buttons, branding, and surface finish.

label: Lifestyle
prompt: Create a refined real-world desk or home setup with minimal props that supports the product story. Keep the full product visible and strictly unchanged.

label: Wearable
prompt: Create an in-use composition showing the product naturally in context when applicable. Preserve exact geometry, interface details, and material finish.

label: Wearable ethnic
prompt: Create a second contextual setup with a different angle and environment variation. Keep the product fully visible and absolutely faithful to the original design.

label: Jewellery Box
prompt: Create a premium close hero composition emphasizing product presence and industrial design with minimal supporting props. Preserve exact structure and detailing.

label: Close Detail
prompt: Create a tight detail shot highlighting material finish, ports, controls, and hardware precision without changing any product details.
